full_text:
Geng Bao 耿苞
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Geng Bao (耿苞). Suggested Yuan Shao take up the Imperial Title, called insane and was executed. Geng Bao was affiliated with Yuan Shao. Geng Bao lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
